scripts.dev: concurrently --names safe,dark "pnpm run dev:safe" "pnpm run dev:dark"
scripts.dev:safe: env INDEXER_PORT=3008 MONGODB_DATABASE=openseo_safe INDEXER_COLLECTION=proofs INDEXER_BLACKLIST_FILE=./blacklist-safe.example.txt DA_WS_URL=wss://openseo-da.openseo.workers.dev/ws DA_HTTP_URL=https://openseo-da.openseo.workers.dev tsx src/indexer-route.ts
scripts.dev:dark: env INDEXER_PORT=3012 MONGODB_DATABASE=openseo_dark INDEXER_COLLECTION=proofs INDEXER_BLACKLIST_FILE=./blacklist-dark.example.txt DA_WS_URL=wss://openseo-da.openseo.workers.dev/ws DA_HTTP_URL=https://openseo-da.openseo.workers.dev tsx src/indexer-route.ts
